body: ## [2.7.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.7.0...v2.7.1) (2018-04-11) ### Bug Fixes * **history:** provide location and use named parameters ([#2877](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2877)) ([761ffa4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/761ffa4))
